channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by INSA and YouGov for BILD, 24–27 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
49 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by INSA and YouGov for BILD, 24–27 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/german_ep_polls/2026-04-27-INSAandYouGov.html
